---
title: "Research"
listing:
  - id: journal-article
    contents: journal_article.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
  - id: big-team
    contents: big_team.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
  - id: in-progress
    contents: in_progress.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
toc: true
date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
---

(^\*^equal contributions; ^\^^mentees; ^\#^correspondence)

## Journal article

::: {#journal-article}
:::

## Big-team projects

::: {#big-team}
:::

## Work in progress

::: {#in-progress}
:::
